extension.summary: Skip intro, recap, credits, and preview segments in movies and TV shows using TheIntroDB
extension.description: Looks up segment timings from TheIntroDB while you watch. Uses TMDB ids when present; otherwise IMDb ids (tt…) with season/episode.
extension.disclaimer: This product uses the TMDB API but is not endorsed or certified by TMDB.
extension.news: v2.0.0 - Usage analytics is now opt-in and off by default. New "End credits action" setting: skip to the end or play the next episode. Skins can drive a native in-OSD skip button. TMDb now resolves IMDb ids for the IntroDB.app fallback. Modernized settings schema and overridable skin templates.
